plugins.name: cctabs
plugins.description: Claude Code tab manager. Terminal tabs as the UI, no tmux. Claude can orchestrate its own sibling sessions.

plugins.name: browser-automation
plugins.description: Browser automation for Claude Code. Persistent Chrome profile, CDP connection.

plugins.name: mytranscriber
plugins.description: Local audio/video transcription via My Transcriber CLI. High-quality Whisper transcription on-device — no cloud. Requires the My Transcriber app installed.
